<?php declare(strict_types=1); namespace PhpParser\Node\Expr\Cast; use PhpParser\Node\Expr\Cast; class Double extends Cast { // For use in "kind" attribute public const KIND_DOUBLE = 1; // "double" syntax public const KIND_FLOAT = 2; // "float" syntax public const KIND_REAL = 3; // "real" syntax public function getType(): string { return 'Expr_Cast_Double'; } }
